summary: Implemented a minimal static web app with four cockpit-style buttons that trigger synthesized Star Wars-inspired laser sound effects using the Web Audio API. Added build, smoke-run, preview, and test scripts plus a small Node test suite for the sound preset/envelope logic.
testingInstructions:
Run `npm run build` to generate `dist/`.
Run `npm test` to execute the Node test suite.
Run `npm start` to execute the smoke test that loads the app logic with browser stubs and verifies all four buttons wire up correctly.
For manual local preview outside this sandbox, run `npm run preview` and open `http://127.0.0.1:4173`.
commitMessage: Add laser sound effects for button presses
